EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} failed to remove build "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} removed build "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to create build "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created build "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
